description: Canonical list of machine-verifiable invariant predicate IDs and their parameter declarations. Each entry defines one predicate that can be referenced in plan.yaml required_invariants. All predicates must be implemented in the deterministic toolchain.

predicates.description: The SHA-256 hash of all public header files must be identical before and after the task.

parameters.name: header_glob
parameters.description: Glob pattern identifying public header files (e.g., 'include/**/*.h').

predicates.description: The exported symbol table diff between the before and after snapshots must be empty.

parameters.name: binary_path
parameters.description: Path to the compiled binary or shared library to inspect.

predicates.description: The set of public OpenAPI paths must be identical before and after the task.

parameters.name: openapi_spec_path
parameters.description: Path to the OpenAPI spec file (JSON or YAML).

predicates.description: The set of allowed hosts after the task must be a superset of the set before.

parameters.name: config_path
parameters.description: Path to the network policy or allowed-hosts configuration file.

predicates.description: The count of critical-severity vulnerabilities after the task must not exceed the count before.

parameters.name: scan_target
parameters.description: File path or directory to pass to the vulnerability scanner.

parameters.name: scanner_id
parameters.description: Identifier of the deterministic vulnerability scanner to use.
